title: 3 Dividend Stocks to Consider for Growth
text: With a number of macro adversities, investing in the stock market can be complex, especially if looking for long-term growth and sustainable dividends. With hundreds of stocks to choose from, it can be time-intensive to determine which ones will provide the best returns.

title: CSX Announces Customer Environmental Excellence Award Winners
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., April 21, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) has recognized the sustainability achievements of 13 rail customers by naming them 2023 CSX Customer Environmental Excellence Award winners.

title: 2 Industrial Strength Dividend Stocks Melting Up
text: Industrial stocks have been struggling to gain traction in 2023, but news from PPG Industries (NYSE: PPG) and CSX (NYSE: CSX) has these stocks melting-up. The combination of underlying business strength and internal efficiencies resulted in better-than-expected earnings reports that point to company profits and investors' capital returns.

title: CSX Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates, Rise Y/Y
text: CSX's first-quarter revenues benefit from solid volume growth in merchandise and coal, higher fuel surcharge and pricing gains.

title: Compared to Estimates, CSX (CSX) Q1 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for CSX (CSX) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended March 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: CSX (CSX) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: CSX (CSX) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.48 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.42 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.39 per share a year ago.

title: Econ Data, Q1 Earnings: Drip, Drip, Drip; CSX Beats
text: Myriad economic and earnings releases may accumulate into something more meaningful ahead of the Fed's next policy meeting.

title: CSX Corp. Announces First Quarter 2023 Results
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., April 20, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) today announced first quarter 2023 operating income of $1.46 billion compared to $1.28 billion in the prior year period. Net earnings of $987 million, or $0.48 per share, compared to $859 million, or $0.39 per share, in the same period last year.

title: Why Investors Should Hold CSX Corporation (CSX) Stock Now
text: Higher export coal volumes and pro-investor steps boost CSX Corporation (CSX). However, supply-chain disruptions are worrisome.

title: Here's What To Expect From CSX's Q1
text: We expect CSX to post revenue and earnings slightly above the street expectations, as the company should continue to benefit from better price realization.

title: CSX Boss: Railroads' Efficiency Model Wasn't Implemented Properly
text: New CEO Joe Hinrichs says railroads' use of the vaunted precision-scheduling model hasn't put enough focus on employees and customers.

title: CSX: A New Strategy And Buying Opportunities
text: In this article, I start by highlighting the macroeconomic challenges facing CSX and recent comments from Morgan Stanley. We also dive into the new strategy implemented by CSX's new CEO, which aims to improve volumes after years of slower volumes.

title: CSX Reaches Paid Sick Leave Agreement with SMART-MD
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., April 07, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX (NASDAQ: CSX) today announced that it has reached an agreement with the Sheet Metal, Air, Rail and Transportation Workers-Mechanical Department (SMART-MD) to provide paid sick leave benefits.

title: CSX Inks Provisional Paid-Sick-Leave Deal With SMART-TD B&O
text: CSX's deal with Sheet Metal, Air, Rail and Transportation Workers-Transportation Division B&O reflects the former's employee-friendly attitude.

title: CSX Reaches Tentative Paid Sick Leave Agreement with SMART-TD B&O Union
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., April 03, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX (NASDAQ: CSX) today announced that it has reached a tentative agreement with the Sheet Metal, Air, Rail and Transportation Workers-Transportation Division B&O (SMART-TD B&O) union to provide CSX trainmen and conductors with paid sick leave benefits.
